parts.text: Check if we have outdated deps

diffs.before:
{
	"name": "markdownlint-lsp",
	"version": "0.7.0",
	"main": "lib/index.mjs",
	"type": "module",
	"author": "Vitaly Slobodin <vitaliy.slobodin@gmail.com>",
	"license": "MIT",
	"description": "A Language Server Protocol (LSP) implementation for markdownlint",
	"keywords": [
		"markdown",
		"markdownlint",
		"lsp",
		"language-server"
	],
	"repository": {
		"type": "git",
		"url": "git+https://github.com/vitallium/markdownlint-lsp.git"
	},
	"bugs": {
		"url": "https://github.com/vitallium/markdownlint-lsp/issues"
	},
	"homepage": "https://github.com/vitallium/markdownlint-lsp#readme",
	"dependencies": {
		"js-yaml": "^4.1.1",
		"markdownlint": "^0.40.0",
		"minimatch": "^10.2.4",
		"vscode-languageserver": "^9.0.1",
		"vscode-languageserver-textdocument": "^1.0.12"
	},
	"devDependencies": {
		"@biomejs/biome": "2.4.6",
		"@types/chai": "^5.2.3",
		"@types/mocha": "^10.0.10",
		"chai": "^6.2.2",
		"mocha": "^11.7.5"
	},
	"bin": {
		"markdownlint-lsp-server": "lib/index.mjs"
	},
	"files": [
		"lib/**/*.mjs"
	],
	"scripts": {
		"start": "node lib/index.mjs --stdio",
		"lint": "biome check .",
		"lint:fix": "biome check --write .",
		"test": "mocha test/**/*.test.mjs",
		"test:watch": "mocha test/**/*.test.mjs --watch",
		"test:server": "mocha test/server.test.mjs",
		"test:config": "mocha test/configuration.test.mjs",
		"test:edge": "mocha test/edge-cases.test.mjs",
		"test:runner": "node test/run-tests.mjs",
		"test:dev": "node test/run-tests.mjs --watch"
	},
	"packageManager": "pnpm@10.28.1+sha512.7d7dbbca9e99447b7c3bf7a73286afaaf6be99251eb9498baefa7d406892f67b879adb3a1d7e687fc4ccc1a388c7175fbaae567a26ab44d1067b54fcb0d6a316"
}
